translation.tagline: Designing and building distributed systems, RESTful APIs & event-driven microservices — primarily in Go.
translation.sobre: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and developing high-availability distributed systems, RESTful APIs, and event-driven microservices. Postgraduate in Distributed Software Architecture. Progressed across payments, credit risk, and independent consulting domains, owning systems end-to-end from architecture to production. Key achievements include eliminating single points of failure in a payment platform processing ~10,000 daily transactions and architecting backend systems with Clean Architecture and DDD.

distributedSystems.descricao: Microservices architecture, high-availability design, and fault-tolerant systems built to scale.

eventDriven.descricao: Kafka, SQS, RabbitMQ — async processing with dead-letter queues and reliable message handling.

cleanArchitecture.descricao: Domain-Driven Design, SOLID principles, and Clean Architecture for modular, testable codebases.

paymentSystems.descricao: ~10,000 daily transactions, WebSocket-driven real-time status, and legacy system decoupling.

bright-minds.descricao: Founded an independent software consultancy, collaborating directly with clients to gather requirements, prioritize delivery scope, and own full-cycle implementation from system design to production. Developed backend systems in Go and C# applying Clean Architecture and DDD. Designed RESTful APIs with a focus on performance, versioning, and backward compatibility. Built CI/CD pipelines on GitHub Actions + Docker, cutting delivery cycles and eliminating all manual deployments. Integrated Kafka-based event streaming to decouple services and enable reliable async processing.

caixa-web.descricao: Eliminated the single point of failure in a payment system handling ~10,000 daily transactions and millions in BRL volume by co-architecting an AWS-hosted microservice that decoupled payment processing from the legacy Oracle infrastructure. Implemented a WebSocket layer that replaced polling and reduced perceived latency to near-zero for cashier operators across physical stores. Ensured async consistency by integrating Kafka topics with a dead-letter queue strategy for failed message handling and reprocessing.

grc.descricao: Eliminated 100% of manual analyst actions required to trigger automated credit analysis by implementing an AWS SQS pipeline that orchestrated business rules, bureau integration, and AI scoring asynchronously. Reduced unnecessarily opened analyses by 50% by refactoring the document-storage layer, also resolving I/O bottlenecks that caused timeouts under production load. Integrated the Serasa bureau API for data enrichment and an AI scoring model.

freelancer.descricao: Collaborated directly with various clients as sole technical point of contact, developing backend APIs and frontend applications end-to-end, owning scope definition, architecture, and delivery. Delivered a complete visual redesign of a SaaS accounting platform as sole frontend engineer, translating 10 UI/UX mockup screens into production code with Angular.

soul.descricao: Synthetic Operative Unit Lifelog — a personal AI assistant that captures audio, transcribes with Whisper, persists in SQLite, and learns the user's vocabulary and communication style over time via RAG.

quasar.descricao: E-commerce project developed as a team for learning purposes, utilizing Angular for the front-end and C# for the back-end.

PicPayChallenge.descricao: Technical challenge at PicPay, including the implementation of Kafka and integration with PagSeguro for various payment methods.

Aluraflix.descricao: Project developed during the fifth edition of Alura's backend challenge. Built using Angular, C#, Asp.Net, and MySQL.

gerenciamentoFuncionarios.descricao: CRUD employee management project, developed using Angular and Spring, with the purpose of learning.

pokedex.descricao: Pokedex project developed using Angular and the PokéApi.

challengeBackendFinancas.descricao: Project developed during the third edition of Alura's backend challenge. Built using C#, Asp.Net, and MySQL.

botJoshue.descricao: A Discord bot developed using JavaScript, Node.js, Discord.js, and the YouTube API.

ShortUrl.descricao: GoShort is a simple and efficient URL shortening service designed for fast redirections.

buscaBinaria.descricao: An article on the Binary Search algorithm, where I explain how the algorithm works, providing practical examples and tests in various scenarios. The article also includes a Golang implementation of the algorithm.

selectionSort.descricao: An article about the Selection Sort algorithm, explaining its step-by-step process with practical examples and tests in different scenarios. It also includes an implementation in Golang.
